description: Exploratory stress cases for likely rule-based classifier weaknesses. This is not a validation dataset and should not be used to tune rules without separate review.

samples.text: I am not saying they are incompetent. I am saying the data does not support their conclusion.
samples.notes: Negated contempt phrase should not be treated as weaponized evidence.

samples.text: She told me, 'you are broken,' but I know that does not define me.
samples.notes: Quoted fixity belongs to another speaker and is revised by the narrator.

samples.text: The character says she is fine, but the narrator shows she is not.
samples.notes: Fictional narration should not be confidently treated as self-report.

samples.text: Q: Did you accept the feedback? A: I said I understood it, but I also said they were wrong about the facts.
I learned an incredible amount from being blamed for everything again.
samples.notes: Sarcasm is implied but lacks obvious sarcasm markers.

samples.text: At first I thought this proved I always ruin everything. Then I reread the notes and realized some of the feedback was fair. I still do not know what to do with the rest of it.
samples.notes: Longer text contains rigid, flexible, and unresolved signals.

samples.text: The data does not support that conclusion, but part of the feedback was useful and I can correct the chart labels.
samples.notes: Evidence-based rejection paired with partial integration should remain flexible.

samples.text: The data proves they are incompetent and anyone who disagrees is too stupid to understand the model.
samples.notes: Evidence language is used as contempt and dominance.

samples.text: I do not accept that. That was not feedback.
samples.notes: Boundary language without accountability or evidence should remain ambiguous.

samples.text: I do not accept being insulted, but I can take responsibility for missing the deadline.
samples.notes: Boundary plus accountability should remain flexible.

samples.text: My chest is tight and my jaw is locked, but I know this is a body reaction and not proof that I am unsafe.
samples.notes: Bodily distress with cognitive counterframing may split between body and interpretation.

samples.text: The employee was rejected by the system because the form was incomplete.
samples.notes: Administrative use of emotionally loaded terms should not imply identity threat.
